title: Supported column types for excel import
excerpt: Hi, is there a document available that shows supported column types for importing to a board via excel. I am currently trying to import a People type column but the import wizard is advising the column type is not suppor…

posts.author: slooby (Sean Looby)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there a document available that shows supported column types for importing to a board via excel. I am currently trying to import a People type column but the import wizard is advising the column type is not supported.

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @slooby , welcome to the Community!

At the moment, you can only import columns as a Number, Status, Email, Date, or Text column. You can, however, change the column type after import.

Feel free to check out this article to learn more about our Excel Import and Export capabilities.

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
